name: Roast Chicken Thighs with Squash/Potato/Spinach "Risotto
recipeIngredient: 4 Each Boneless Skinless Chicken Breast Halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Toast fennel seeds in a skillet over medium heat until fragrant, then let cool and grind them.
3. Stir the ground fennel seeds with white pepper, coriander, and salt to combine.
4. Season chicken with the spice mixture.
5. Place seasoned chicken in an ovenproof skillet and roast until cooked through, about 10 minutes per side.
6. In a saucepan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic and cook until lightly browned.
7. Add diced potatoes, thyme, and white wine to the pan; lower the heat to medium and cook, stirring constantly, until the wine is absorbed (about 7 minutes).
8. Add butternut squash and about 3/4 cup of chicken broth to the pan; cook, stirring, until the broth is absorbed and vegetables are tender, adding up to 3/4 cup more as needed.
9. Stir in spinach leaves and Parmesan cheese; remove from heat.
10. Transfer roasted chicken to a serving dish and pour any remaining liquid back into the skillet.
11. Add about 1/2 cup of chicken broth to the pan and place it over medium heat, stirring until reduced by half (about 4 minutes).
12. Stir the reduced sauce into the risotto mixture.
